name: Azure Coast Resort
tagline: Barefoot luxury on the turquoise coast
description: Azure Coast Resort is a secluded beachfront sanctuary where whitewashed villas meet the endless Mediterranean blue. Five-star spa, private beach, and chef-led coastal dining.

home.heroSubhead: A family-owned resort on 40 private acres of Mediterranean coastline.
home.bookingHeadline: Plan Your Stay on the Coast
home.bookingSubhead: Check live rates and reserve your oceanfront suite in seconds.

amenities.heading: Resort Amenities
amenities.intro: From morning yoga on the bluff to moonlit dinners at the water's edge.

items.label: Infinity Pool
items.description: Three heated pools overlooking the sea
